cognitum.description: Cognitum Cloud control plane (api.cognitum.one). 7 cloud MCP tools: catalog, orders, witness chain, etc. Add COGNITUM_API_KEY for write operations.

cognitum-seed.description: Local Cognitum Seed appliance (114 on-device tools). Requires paired bearer token. Falls back to USB-gadget at http://169.254.42.1/mcp (no auth, physical cable trust).
